summary: Navigation restructuring to client-first pattern - Frontend testing complete. All navigation changes verified working as expected. Bottom navigation shows 4 tabs (Home, Clients, Messages, Profile), Quick Actions simplified to 2 items (See Clients, Appointments), and client tools accessible via Client Detail.
critical_code_review_comments: Code review confirms _layout.tsx files use href: null correctly to hide tabs while keeping screens accessible via navigation
providerConfig.ts quickActions correctly simplified to 2 items for both Doula and Midwife
ProviderNotes.tsx has back button when accessed with clientId parameter
context_for_next_testing_agent: Navigation restructuring complete. Bottom nav has 4 visible tabs. Tools accessed via Clients > Client Detail > Tool. Quick actions on dashboard reduced to 2 items.

doula_bottom_navigation_4_tabs.evidence: Screenshot shows Home, Clients, Messages, Profile tabs in bottom navigation
doula_bottom_navigation_4_tabs.hidden_tabs: appointments, notes, contracts, invoices, contract-templates are hidden via href: null

midwife_bottom_navigation_4_tabs.evidence: Screenshot shows Home, Clients, Messages, Profile tabs in bottom navigation
midwife_bottom_navigation_4_tabs.hidden_tabs: appointments, notes, visits, contracts, invoices, contract-templates, birth-summaries are hidden via href: null

clients_tab_navigation.evidence: Navigated to /clients showing Active Clients list (7 for Doula, 6 for Midwife)

client_detail_from_clients.evidence: Clicking client opens Client Detail with URL pattern /client-detail?clientId=...&clientName=...

notes_from_client_detail.evidence: Add Note quick action navigates to /notes?clientId=...&clientName=... showing client-scoped notes

back_button_in_notes.evidence: Notes screen shows back arrow and title shows 'ClientName's Notes' with 'Client Notes' subtitle

dashboard_quick_actions_simplified.evidence: Dashboard shows only 'See Clients' and 'Appointments' as quick actions (2 items instead of previous 4+)

screenshots_taken: doula_dashboard.png - Shows 4-tab navigation and 2 quick actions

doula_add_note_screen.png - Shows client-scoped notes with back button
midwife_dashboard.png - Shows 4-tab navigation and 2 quick actions
midwife_client_detail_full.png - Shows Mia Anderson client detail
